title: Refactor voice/page.tsx — remove dual-mode UX, add learning confirmation UI

context_files.reason: Complete UX refactor requirements and learning confirmation UI specs
Project overview and architecture principle: extending not rewriting

acceptance_criteria: Dual-mode toggle labels replaced: 'force translate' vs 'prestix' (single identity)
Mode section in control panel uses updated translatorToggle labels
Voice dock, voice presence, assistantUx imports use updated unified copy
sessionModeLabel calls in page.tsx reflect new semantics
Learning confirmation UI added: after successful translation, show 'Did Prestix get this right?' with confirm/reject buttons
Learning feedback sent to API via confirmLearning field in request body
translatorEnabled toggle remains functional as 'force translate' override
No core behavior changes — only UX label changes + learning UI addition
All existing Playwright e2e tests still pass or are updated for new labels
